# Assessment Overview

This directory contains supplementary assessment artifacts generated for the versioned eShopOnWeb report.

- [architecture-diagram.md](./architecture-diagram.md) — High-level application architecture and component relationship diagrams.
- [dependency-map.md](./dependency-map.md) — External dependency inventory grouped by functional category.
- [api-service-contracts.md](./api-service-contracts.md) — Service catalog, endpoint inventory, DTO contracts, and request flow sequence.
- [data-architecture.md](./data-architecture.md) — Database configuration, entity model, repository usage, and data sensitivity notes.
- [configuration-inventory.md](./configuration-inventory.md) — Configuration sources, runtime profiles, secrets workflow, and framework versions.
- [business-workflows.md](./business-workflows.md) — Core domain workflows, service ownership, and business rule summary.
